articles.author: David Carcasole
articles.title: Valve Remains “Hard at Work” on Steam Deck 2 Four Years After Gabe Newell First Teased the Handheld Successor - Wccftech
articles.description: Valve remains hard at work on Steam Deck 2 four years after it was initially confirmed to be part of the company's plans.
articles.content: Valve confirmed that the first of its previously announced hardware products, the Steam Controller, would be making its way to players next week on May 4, after several leaks had already ruined the s… [+2647 chars]

articles.author: Jennifer Ouellette
articles.title: Study: Infrasound likely a key factor in alleged hauntings - Ars Technica
articles.description: Low-frequency infrasound (below 20 Hz) can raise cortisol levels in saliva and increase irritability.
